name: Kunta Mallik Raj

responsibilities: Owned investigation and resolution of P0/P1 production incidents across distributed backend services, debugging failures across SNS pipelines, microservices, ServiceNow, and Slack integrations.
Re-architected a multi-tenant WebSocket platform supporting real-time SOC collaboration with schema validation, backpressure handling, and Redis-backed session isolation.
Identified inefficient database queries and contention in DarkWeb asset processing workflows, reducing 18+ second latency and improving production API response times.
Designed distributed state synchronization ensuring consistency of 'Awaiting Customer Actions' and findings status across Executive Reports and SOC dashboards.
Implemented concurrent editor detection using optimistic locking to prevent conflicting updates in collaborative investigation pipelines.
Strengthened platform security with input validation, rate limiting, and tenant-aware Redis session management.
Built event-driven backend workflows to propagate severity, confidence, and category updates across SOC investigation pipelines.
Authored technical articles on Data Structures, Algorithms, and JavaScript.
Reviewed and improved production-grade code samples for correctness, performance, and readability.

projects.name: AI Meeting Minutes Generator
description: Built an end-to-end system converting meeting transcripts into structured summaries and action items using LLM-based summarization.
Implemented NLP pipelines for summarization, action-item extraction, and semantic search using Hugging Face Transformers and LangChain.
Integrated Chroma vector database for embedding-based retrieval enabling contextual search across large transcript datasets.
Reduced manual documentation time by automatically generating structured meeting summaries.

achievements: LeetCode Rating 1719 (Top 12% globally), solved 1000+ algorithmic problems.
Global Rank 1102 / 27,473 in LeetCode Biweekly Contest 143.
Department Topper for three consecutive years (2023–2025); awarded Silver Medal for academic excellence.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Information Technology
education.institution: Vignan Institute of Technology and Science, Hyderabad (JNTUH)
